data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all NFL players currently available as free agents. Returns an array of PlayerBasic objects containing player identification, name, position, and other relevant profile information. This operation is useful for identifying players not currently under contract with any NFL team.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and actionable, but the description is completely missing. Added context about what free agents are in the NFL domain, specified the return type (array of PlayerBasic objects), and explained the use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.current_summary: Get rookie players from a specified draft year
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all NFL players drafted in a specified season/year. Accepts a season parameter (e.g., 2023, 2024) to filter players by their draft year. Returns an array of PlayerBasic objects containing player identification, name, position, draft information, and other profile details. Useful for analyzing draft classes or identifying players from a particular year.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear but the description is missing entirely. Added details about the season parameter format and expectations, clarified the return type as an array of PlayerBasic objects, and provided context about use cases to help AI agents determine when this operation is appropriate.
